publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 165, folios 92-93. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Sweetest Mate. I have had this morning a most interesting visit from Dr Locock, about which you shall hear more when Avis gets to her quiet country perch. She is pretty well, & has

done much business, I have sheets to tell you about the furniture & house arrangements. I think you will approve of all I have done, as well as of what I [I is written over we] project doing, waiting first for ou leave. I set out almost directly, & am a very nice chirping avis,
belonging to the sweetest of all cocks.--
Present my compliments to Mr & Mrs Ford.-- Birdie
